description: Machine-checkable, SECRET-FREE readiness expectations for the one-time out-of-Git staging-live bootstrap. Every item names a required trust root and the secret-free attestation SECP expects. No item may carry a concrete value: only closed booleans and descriptive requirement/evidence text. Concrete endpoints, hostnames, IPs, ports, certificates, keys, tokens, secret references, CA names, and credentials live ONLY on the isolated staging control plane and are NEVER committed.

items.requirement: A self-contained staging control-plane VM hosts the staging API, database, and worker.
items.evidence: Attestation that the staging control plane runs isolated from production and public networks.

items.requirement: Authoritative records load only from the isolated staging database, never the production SECP database.
items.evidence: Attestation that the staging database is authoritative solely for this isolated environment.

items.requirement: A staging-only API serves the staging control plane and never proxies to production.
items.evidence: Attestation that the staging API is self-contained and production-independent.

items.requirement: A staging-only worker runs the sealed staging-live composition on the isolated plane.
items.evidence: Attestation that the worker is deployment-local and imports no production runtime wiring.

items.requirement: The target is a disposable, nested Proxmox instance holding only synthetic bounded resources.
items.evidence: Attestation that the target can be destroyed and rebuilt and runs no untrusted workloads.

items.requirement: No route exists to any home, corporate, production-control-plane, LAN, WAN, or public network.
items.evidence: Attestation that the only reachable peers are the staging target and staging OpenBao.

items.requirement: The target-facing plane has no default gateway.
items.evidence: Attestation that no default route is configured on the isolated plane.

items.requirement: The target-facing plane has no DNS resolver.
items.evidence: Attestation that name resolution is unavailable on the isolated plane.

items.requirement: A private staging certificate authority, created only for this environment, is the sole trust anchor.
items.evidence: The CA trust-root FINGERPRINT (a hash) is recorded; the certificate content is not.

items.requirement: The worker private key material is deployment-local and injected, never in Git or an env var.
items.evidence: Attestation that private material is provided only via an injected deployment-local provider.

items.requirement: The worker holds a short-lived certificate issued by the private staging CA.
items.evidence: Attestation of certificate validity bounds; the certificate content is not recorded.

items.requirement: The worker authenticates to staging OpenBao using mutual TLS bound to the private staging CA.
items.evidence: The readiness canary proves authentication succeeds without reading any secret.

items.requirement: OpenBao policy permits reading only the single synthetic staging credential path.
items.evidence: Attestation of the least-privilege policy scope; the policy path value is not recorded.

items.requirement: A synthetic canary secret proves resolution wiring without exposing the real read credential.
items.evidence: Attestation that the canary secret is synthetic and disposable.

items.requirement: The only resolvable credential is a least-privilege, staging-only Proxmox read credential.
items.evidence: Attestation that the credential grants read-only inventory access and nothing else.

items.requirement: Egress is default-deny; only the approved staging read and OpenBao auth flows are permitted.
items.evidence: Attestation that any other connection attempt fails closed.

items.requirement: Immediate revocation of certificate, OpenBao role, activation authorization, and NIC is rehearsed.
items.evidence: Attestation that each revocation independently causes the next operation to fail closed.

items.requirement: Every trust root is attested to staging SECP as secret-free evidence before any canary.
items.evidence: Only identifiers, versions, pinned labels, closed status codes, and hashes are recorded.
